name: multi-language-content
description: Agent handles Korean and English page content correctly.

setup.pageContent: 안녕하세요. Hello world. 한국어 텍스트와 English text mixed.

steps.expect: response => [ {ok: response.ok === true, message: 'getVisibleText should succeed'}, {ok: response.text.includes('안녕하세요'), message: 'should preserve Korean text'}, {ok: response.text.includes('Hello'), message: 'should preserve English text'} ]
response => [ {ok: response.context.headings.length === 2, message: 'should return 2 headings'}, {ok: response.context.headings[0].text.includes('환영합니다'), message: 'first heading should be Korean'} ]
